_comment: Dataverse-style work-order tracker for Arundel facilities. This is the create_entity / update_entity / fetch write target for the 'Agent with MCP / Tools' tier (the update-work-order hero action). Rows have stable ids; writes append or patch here at runtime (in-memory unless persisted).
